prompt: Create a cross-platform C++20 library project named 'math_utils' for Windows x64 in /tmp/cpp_eval_math_utils. It should be a static library with unit tests, clang-tidy analysis preset, and PowerShell format/bootstrap scripts. Also add a VS Code launch config for cppvsdbg.
assertions: CMakeLists.txt targets C++20 and defines a math_utils_lib library
CMakePresets.json contains windows-x64-debug, windows-x64-release, and windows-x64-tidy presets
.vscode/launch.json includes a cppvsdbg configuration for Windows
README.md shows PowerShell bootstrap and build commands
